case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. NAOMIA PAYTON et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KARAYEL, SUZAN SUBSTITUTED FOR EVJE, ARNOLD WALTER AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTON, NAOMIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYTON, NAOMIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1846 SUNNYDALE AVE. S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
